title: Metcal Introduces CV-IOT Gateway Module and Desktop Application
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , May 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Metcal, part of OK International and Dover (NYSE: DOV), and a leader in benchtop soldering for electronics and industrial manufacturing, announced the launch of its new CV-IOT Gateway Module and desktop application, which enables operations management to collect advanced soldering data from every benchtop station on their network.

title: Here's Why You Should Hold Dover (DOV) in Your Portfolio Now
text: Dover (DOV) gains from solid backlog levels and volume growth despite cost and supply-chain headwinds.

title: Dover Joins the Hydrogen Council
text: The company will collaborate and engage with other leading companies to accelerate the deployment of hydrogen solutions around the world DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , May 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover (NYSE: DOV) today announced that it has joined the Hydrogen Council, a global CEO-led initiative that brings together leading companies with a united vision to help foster the hydrogen clean energy transition.

title: Dover Corporation: Reiterating 'Buy' On Order Recovery
text: The 1Q23 earnings results came in better than expected, with higher profits and better March order trends. Management anticipates a recovery in growth during the second half of 2023, with indications of bottoming out order trends.

title: Markem-Imaje Launches the Industry's First Innovations for Extrusion Marking & Coding
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , May 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Markem-Imaje, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a global provider of end-to-end supply chain solutions and industrial marking and coding systems, today announced the launch of the 9750 E continuous inkjet (CIJ) printer range, bringing to market industry-first innovations for the extrusion sector.

title: 13 Blue-Chips For The Ultimate High-Yield Buffett-Style Dividend Aristocrat Portfolio

title: PSG Launches New and Updated Flow-Sensor and Flow-Measurement Technologies
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , May 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- PSG, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a global pump, metering and dispensing-solution expert, today announced the launch of its new BioProTT™ FlowSU System and updated SumoFlo® CPFM-8103 Single-Use Coriolis Mass Flow Meter technologies.

title: The Retirees' Dividend Portfolio: John And Jane's April 2023 Taxable Account Update
text: The Taxable Account generated $1,760.46 of dividend income for April 2023 compared with $1,609.40 of dividend income for April 2022. The Taxable Account had a balance of $523.4K as of April 30, 2023, vs. $522.7K on April 30, 2022. The annualized cost basis yield is 5.38%.

title: Dover Declares Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , May 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of Dover (NYSE: DOV) today declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.505 (fifty and one-half cents) per share, payable on June 15, 2023, to shareholders of record as of May 31, 2023.
